title: [CC] TieredZ - Immersive Armors
description: A compatibility datapack/mod for TieredZ and Immersive Armors.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3abed17ca064afe0d3719cd815b9d4193dbf2ac5.png)
---
Centralized Compatibility is a collection of datapacks/mods I made for myself to add support between mods. I felt that these could also be public for others to use and include in their modpacks.

Each compatibility pack is provided as-is, with all the necessary data added for them to function between mods. They come as datapacks by default, but can be installed as a mod if you prefer loading them as a mod.

## Current Compatibility Packs
You can find all compatibility packs available in the [Centralized Compatibility collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/oenqPulj) for specific mods.

## Modpacks and Usage
You are free to include the content in modpacks, or modify for personal use.
